title: Open Map Data References
html:
This folder stores license-cleared or license-reviewable non-commercial source archives used for clean-room world map construction.

Current collected sources:

  • natural-earth/110m/: Natural Earth 1:110m vector archives downloaded on

2026-06-23. They are tracked by data/core/map-data/world_map_collection_manifest.json.

  • natural-earth/10m/: Natural Earth 1:10m vector archives downloaded on

2026-06-23 for Phase 1 Lower Yangtze/Huai physical basemap support. They are tracked by data/era-packages/southern-ming/curated/geography/phase1_map_source_evidence_manifest.json.

  • geonames/: GeoNames China dump downloaded on 2026-06-23 for modern

coordinate and homonym-disambiguation reference. GeoNames data requires attribution under CC BY 4.0 and is tracked by the Phase 1 map source evidence manifest.

Policy:

  • Raw source archives in this folder are reference/source inputs, not gameplay

truth.

  • Promote only project-authored derived records into data/ after license,

attribution, source-tier, and quality-level checks pass.

  • Keep commercial game data out of this folder unless an explicit import license

exists.
plainText: Open Map Data References This folder stores license cleared or license reviewable non commercial source archives used for clean room world map construction. Current collected sources: natural earth/110m/: Natural Earth 1:110m vector archives downloaded on 2026 06 23. They are tracked by data/core/map data/world map collection manifest.json. natural earth/10m/: Natural Earth 1:10m vector archives downloaded on 2026 06 23 for Phase 1 Lower Yangtze/Huai physical basemap support. They are tracked by data/era packages/southern ming/curated/geography/phase1 map source evidence manifest.json. geonames/: GeoNames China dump downloaded on 2026 06 23 for modern coordinate and homonym disambiguation reference. GeoNames data requires attribution under CC BY 4.0 and is tracked by the Phase 1 map source evidence manifest. Policy: Raw source archives in this folder are reference/source inputs, not gameplay truth. Promote only project authored derived records into data/ after license, attribution, source tier, and quality level checks pass. Keep commercial game data out of this folder unless an explicit import license exists.
